LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OPPOSING PARTY TO CONTEST THE TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER ELIZABETH UREMOVIC'S HEARING OF AMENDED VERIFIED PETITION OF WRIT OF MANDATE IS DENIED. NOTWITHSTANDING THE PROCEDURAL DEFECTS, THE MOTION IS DENIED ON THE MERITS. PETITIONER HAS NOT ATTACHED ANY EVIDENCE SHOWING THAT SHE MADE A REQUEST FOR THE RELEASE OF PUBLIC RECORDS TO THE APPROPRIATE GOVERNMENTAL ENTITY PRIOR TO FILING THIS PETITION. (GOV. CODE SEC. 6259(A).) PETITIONER HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THAT RESPONDENT IS A STATE OR LOCAL AGENCY, AS DEFINED BY GOV. CODE SEC. 6252. (SEE ALSO REGENTS V. UNIVERSITY OF CAL. V. SUP. CT. (2013) 222 CAL.APP.4TH 383.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ELIZABETH UREMOVIC'S HEARING OF AMENDED VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 26, 2014, TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS, INCLUDING THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD, TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 20, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR5976

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Feb-28-2014 Off Calendar

Amended Ntc Of Hearing Of Amended Verified Petition Of Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Feb-26-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ELIZABETH UREMOVIC, TEL. NO. (702) 503-2022, PETITIONER APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - Notice was not given to the opposing party to contest the tentative ruling. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ELIZABETH UREMOVIC's Hearing Of Amended Verified Petition Of Writ Of Mandate is Denied. Notwithstanding the procedural defects, the motion is denied on the merits. Petitioner has not attached any evidence showing that she made a request for the release of public records to the appropriate governmental entity prior to filing this petition. (Gov. Code sec. 6259(a).) Petitioner has not established that Respondent is a state or local agency, as defined by Gov. Code sec. 6252. (See also Regents v. University of Cal. v. Sup. Ct. (2013) 222 Cal.App.4th 383.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ehg

Elizabeth A. Uremovic'S Notice Of Hearing Of Amended Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Feb-20-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elizabeth Unemovic, 702.503.2022, Plaintiff in Propria Persona; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ELIZABETH UREMOVIC'S Hearing Of Amended Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate is continued to February 26, 2014, to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers, including the Administrative Record, to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 20, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT UNION BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION IS Off calendar as moot. A First Amended Verified Petition was filed on December 27, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
